name: Website Monitor
description: Monitor a website for changes and get notified

agents.name: Web Fetcher
agents.purpose: Fetch the current content of a web page
agents.system_prompt_hint: Fetch the specified web page and extract its main content. Note any prices, stock status, or key data points.

agents.name: Change Detector
agents.purpose: Compare fetched content against previous state and report changes
agents.system_prompt_hint: Compare the current content with the previously saved version. Report any meaningful changes, new items, or price differences.

author: agentfactory
